scope: Compact cross-path summary for parser, LibMoonCat traits, and reviewed on-chain materialization surfaces. It does not import generated SVGs, palettes, coordinate arrays, contract state, or accessory composition data.

paths.parser: mooncatparser accepts bytes5-style hex input and returns a nested local pixel/color grid; parity fixtures normalize geometry and color-role counts without treating the grid as canonical palette data.
paths.libmooncat: LibMoonCat supplies array-backed identifier conversion and extended trait comparison. Its browser image helpers require DOM support and are not executed in the zero-network harness.
paths.mooncatSVGs: Reviewed imageOf overloads accept bytes5 or rescueOrder, read MoonCatTraits and MoonCatColors, assemble an SVG string, and use a guarded rescueOrder-to-catId lookup. No checked-in contract output is available for exact or structural SVG comparison.
paths.mooncatAccessoryImages: Reviewed accessorized image paths accept rescueOrder and compose source-owned records with accessory definitions, palettes, image data, and base SVG helpers. The deterministic inputs needed for an accessory fixture are not checked in.

deferred: accessory composition and current worn state

limitations: Structural parser parity is not byte-identical SVG or cross-renderer proof.
Human-facing color labels do not establish palette values or orientation.
Current ownership, acclimation/glow state, accessory ownership, and worn configuration are outside the fixture harness.
